---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: hero-wrapper
::: hero-text
# Your Name

::: hero-tags
[PhD Candidate]{.tag} [Your Role]{.tag} [Your Institution]{.tag}
:::

::: hero-bio
A brief bio about you and your work. Describe your role, institution, and research interests in 2–3 sentences. This appears on the home page beneath your name.
:::

::: hero-links
[Research →](pages/research.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-primary} [Education & Experience →](pages/history.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-secondary} [Get in touch →](pages/contact.qmd){.hero-btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::

::: hero-photo
![Your Name](images/profile.jpg){.profile-img}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
## Current focus

Write 2–3 sentences here describing your current research area or project. This is a good place to briefly explain what you're working on and why it matters.
:::

::: stats-strip
::: stat-item
**📄**\
**0**\
Publications
:::

::: stat-item
**🔰**\
**0**\
In progress
:::

::: stat-item
**↗️**\
**20XX**\
PhD started
:::

::: stat-item
**✅**\
**Your Uni**\
Institution
:::
:::

::: card
### Research & Publications

A short description of your research and publication record.

[Read more →](pages/research.qmd){.card-link}

### Education & Experience

Your academic history, roles, and professional background.

[Where have I been? →](pages/history.qmd){.card-link}

### Contact

The best way to reach you for research, teaching, or other inquiries.

[Get in touch →](pages/contact.qmd){.card-link}
:::
